framework.name: AP2 Three-Mandate Model (HP/HNP/Payment)
framework.description: AP2 defines three mandate types: Cart Mandate (human-present, merchant+user co-sign), Intent Mandate (human-not-present, user pre-approves conditions like budget/timing for autonomous agent action), and Payment Mandate (minimal credential derived from either, appended to authorization for issuer visibility). This is the concrete mechanism for delegated payment authority.
framework.raw_quote: Intent Mandate ('Human-Not-Present' or 'HNP'), where the user pre-approves defined conditions (e.g., budget, product categories, or timing) that authorize an agent to act later.

source.title: PayPal Community Blog | Agent Payments Protocol: Building Verifiable Trust for Agentic Commerce
